//: Example Claude Code hooks for agent-lessonbook. Merge into .claude/settings.json and fix the path to lessonbook_hook.py. TRIGGER-ONLY: it nudges the model to consider correction-capture; PreCompact also writes an UNREVIEWED pending to the inbox. It never writes a final lesson and never promotes. Set LESSONBOOK_INBOX if you don't use state/lessonbook/inbox.md.
